nodes.label: createAdminSupabaseClient
nodes.rationale: Passing the access token only as an Authorization header left auth.uid() returning NULL inside RLS policies; the fix makes the function async and calls client.auth.setSession() so RLS can identify the user. Anon key + user session was deliberately chosen over the service role key for least privilege, audit trail, and to catch permission bugs (service role bypasses all RLS).
